specific_question: How did competitor sustainability initiatives across North American EV sector evolve in Q4 2025
answer: According to competitor sustainability reports, several major competitors, including Ford and Tesla, expanded sustainability initiatives in Q4 2025, publishing joint environmental targets aligned with Science-Based Target Initiative standards.
dr_question: Based on the 2024 report "Trends in electric cars" on iea.org, which developments in battery technology and EV supply chains are likely to impact global production and delivery dynamics by Q2 2026?
